nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Flame-templed babbler
nodes.summary: Flame-templed babbler（Flame-templed babbler，学名 Dasycrotapha speciosa），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于Mount Talinis，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Mount Talinis
nodes.summary: Mount Talinis是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括棕尾斑嘴犀鳥、Visayan cuckooshrike、Flame-templed babbler等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in the proposed Central Panay Mountain Range Park which contains the largest block of remaining forest in the Western Visayas, and the tourist destination of Twin Lakes (Mount Talinis)

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss. Along with the Negros striped babbler, it is one of the two babbler species extremely sought after by birdwatchers on Negros

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It was only fairly recently discovered in Panay in 1987 and is only found in five localities. This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
